tasks.title: Define requirements & scope
tasks.description: Gather functional and non-functional requirements including: Own vehicles vs Rental vehicles, vehicle types (Cars, Vans, Mini-vans, Lorries, Cabs, Double-cabs, Boom Trucks), site/office dispatch, driver OT calculation, insurance/warranty tracking, payment module with tax/VAT support, short/long rentals.
acceptanceCriteria: Detailed requirements doc covering all business features
Entity list: Vehicle, RentalVehicle, OwnedVehicle, Driver, DriverOT, Insurance, VehiclePayment, PaymentTax, VATConfig, Site/Office
Vehicle type taxonomy (Cars, Vans, Mini-vans, Lorries, Cabs, Double-cabs, Boom Trucks, Trucks)
Payment flows with tax/VAT calculation examples

tasks.title: Identify domain models
tasks.description: Define core domain entities (Vehicle, Driver, Assignment, Maintenance, Trip, FuelLog, etc.) and relationships.

tasks.title: Design database schema
tasks.description: Create normalized schema, indices, migrations and sample queries for main flows.

tasks.title: Define REST API spec
tasks.description: Design REST (or GraphQL) endpoints for CRUD, assignments, maintenance, reports and webhooks.

tasks.title: Implement backend endpoints
tasks.description: Implement API endpoints, validation, services, and persistence according to spec.

tasks.title: Implement frontend UI
tasks.description: Create UI screens for vehicle listing, detail, edit, trips management, payments, fleet reports, driver management, and dashboard widget.
acceptanceCriteria: Vehicle list page with filters (status, ownership, search)
Vehicle detail view with all fields
Trip list, create, and detail pages with Start/End actions
Payments page with Create Payment and Record Receipt dialogs
Fleet Reports page with date filters and by-type breakdown
Driver management placeholder with detail page
Dashboard widget showing vehicle status summary
Sidebar menu navigation for Vehicle Management section
All pages follow existing ERP UI patterns (Sidebar + Header + layout)

tasks.title: Integrate with workflow events
tasks.description: Hook vehicle events into project workflow (notifications, approvals, state transitions).

tasks.title: Implement auth & roles
tasks.description: Add role-based access for fleet managers, drivers, and admins; secure endpoints and UI routes.

tasks.title: Add reporting & notifications
tasks.description: Add scheduled reports, CSV export, and push/email notifications for key events.

tasks.title: Implement Payment & Tax Module
tasks.description: Build payment processing for rentals and services; integrate tax/VAT calculation, invoice generation, and payment history.

tasks.title: Implement Driver OT & Insurance Module
tasks.description: Track driver overtime, manage insurance policies (vehicle & driver), warranty tracking, and compliance alerts.

tasks.title: Implement Site/Office Vehicle Dispatch
tasks.description: Manage vehicle allocation across multiple sites/offices, dispatch workflows, and vehicle availability tracking.

tasks.title: Implement Rental vs Owned Vehicle Management
tasks.description: Distinguish rental and owned vehicles, manage rental contracts, ownership history, and vehicle lifecycle.

tasks.title: Implement GPS Tracking & Real-time Location
tasks.description: Integrate GPS tracking, live vehicle location, geofencing, and route history.

tasks.title: Implement Fuel Management & Cost Analysis
tasks.description: Track fuel consumption, costs, efficiency metrics, and generate fuel reports.

tasks.title: Implement Mobile App for Drivers
tasks.description: Build mobile app for drivers to view assignments, track location, log trips, and receive notifications.

tasks.title: Write tests & CI/CD for all modules
tasks.description: Add unit, integration, and E2E tests for all modules; configure CI/CD pipeline.

tasks.title: Deployment & documentation
tasks.description: Prepare deployment manifests, runbooks, and comprehensive user documentation.

agent_instructions.pick_policy: Choose the lowest-id task with status 'not-started' whose dependencies are all 'completed' or empty.
agent_instructions.claim: Set task.status='in-progress', create a branch named 'feature/vm-task-<id>', commit changes, and update this JSON.
agent_instructions.complete: Set task.status='completed', add a summary to task.outputs, and open a PR referencing the task id.
